summary: Test suite covers core requirements well: all major functions (parse_manifest, check_license, build_report, load_config, main) are tested, both manifest types are covered, all license statuses are exercised, and mocking strategy is sound. Workflow testing validates structure (triggers, jobs, actionlint) and runs 3 act-based scenarios with exact output assertions. Design is clean: good test organization by topic, proper fixture isolation with tempfile, readable names. However, rigor is limited: missing edge cases (empty manifests, malformed JSON/requirements), error scenarios (invalid syntax, exception handling beyond LicenseLookupError), boundary conditions, JSON output format, and comprehensive CLI error paths. Act test coverage is only 3 scenarios. Would catch major regressions but miss subtle bugs in parsing edge cases, config validation, and error handling.
